reason: Immediate price weakness and heightened volatility, as evidenced by Bitcoin falling below $67,000 and giving back gains, along with an isolated flash crash incident, are increasing short-term market risk. While long-term institutional adoption continues to gain traction (UK ETNs, 401k plans), recent insider trading allegations introduce a layer of regulatory scrutiny and trust concerns, warranting a cautious approach.
headlines: UK investors have just one month to add crypto ETNs in tax-free wrapper: FT
Bitcoin briefly crashes below $48,000 on upstart exchange despite crypto rally
Crypto for Advisors: Crypto’s fixture in 401(k) plans
Bitcoin falls back below $67,000, rapidly giving back Wednesday's gains
The Protocol: Blockchain sleuth ZachXBT alleges Axiom employee conducted insider trading
